item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as metric trend decision analysis, stayed direct, and did not invoke triage or repeated-repair framing. It gave a conditional decision centered on the direction of complaint delta, preserving the old plan when the new plan has rising complaint risk, which matches the requested analysis."}
